description: whois is a Python module/library for retrieving WHOIS data for domain names and IP addresses.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/whois && python3 whois.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/whois && python3 whois.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/whois && python3 whois.py --help`. WHOIS lookup for domains and IPs.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the osint category. Fits when the engagement needs: WHOIS lookup for domains and IPs.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: WHOIS lookup for domains and IPs.
